function:src/renderer/screens/main/components/WorkspaceView/ContentView/TabsContent/TabView/ChatPane/ChatPaneInterface/components/ChatMessageList/components/MessageScrollbackRail/MessageScrollbackRail.tsx:message.content
		.filter(
			(
				part: ChatMessagePart,
			): part is Extract<ChatMessagePart, { type: "text" }> =>
				part.type === "text",
		)
		.map((part: Extract<ChatMessagePart, { type: "text" }>) => part.text.trim())
		.filter(Boolean)
		.join(" ")
		.replace(/\s+/g, " ")
		.trim
